series_metadata.series_description: The Qualified Health Plan (QHP) application includes the Self Insured (SI) employer’s information to plan for the medical management of it’s claims. The information in the QHP application includes written information detailing the QHP contract information, organization, health care provider network, medical case and utilization management.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until the file is cancelled or files bankruptcy, then retain for 17 years, and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until the file is cancelled or files bankruptcy, retain for 17 years, and then destroy. If scanned, verify the scanned image is readable, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
